title: Fazcraft: Hoaxes
description: An unofficial Fazcraft Addon that adds Hoaxes from the FNaF Community!
body:
![A render behind a classic FNaF camera overlay of Salvage, an entity from the mod, shrouded in shadow and a red light behind him. Text beside him reads "This mod requires Geckolib and Fazcraft to function properly! Links below!"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63b94f67a4c74c2e5d78e49e62ea72370ddbb2e5.png)
**Additionally, in 1.20.1, it also requires Patchouli!**

[Fazcraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/fazcraft)
[Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
![Another render with a classic FNaF camera overlay, this time of the Purple Guy Animatronic, lit up by red and magenta lights. The text beside it reads "Unique bosses with their own mechanics and structures!"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/538bb10c01bb1894c03dcf322975c50e73d5f3ac_0.webp)
**Animatronics previously believed to be legends and fakes invade your world through the sheer willpower of Delusion! Each one of them with their own plush suits, plushes and head blocks!**
![A render of Sparky the Dog, with a classic FNaF camera overlay. Text beside him reads "Unique structures!"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4695e5d78ece2a44320fed3a062704a0db07a52a_0.webp)
**Each hoax is their own boss with their own structure you can find around in the world! Although rare, most structures can be found in specific biomes!**


This mod was made for fun (and appreciation for Fazcraft as a mod) in a very short time and by a very unexperienced person! Updates are planned to add more blocks, hoaxes and content in general, still, be pacient as updates me take a while.
